languages.text: "Куда важнее решить, что делать с тассерцием. Мы не можем проигнорировать подобный... ресурс". {n}Соломон смотрит вам прямо в глаза.{/n} "Мое предложение — уничтожить весь добытый тассерций и его залежи. Против Лекса позволять существовать подобной мерзости. Что касается оценки осквернения Тассеры и ее участи, закон предписывает оставить это на суд владельца мира — Администратума".

traits.locale_text: "Остается главный вопрос — десятина. Судя по документам, частота поставки — каждое терранское десятилетие. Установленная норма — тысяча грузовых единиц тассерция. И какая-то часть может быть варп-активна, если Руолдо не соврал нам".
traits.speaker: SolomorneCompanion

languages.text: "Deciding what to do with the thassertium is far more important. It is a... resource we cannot afford to ignore." {n}Solomorne looks you straight in the eye.{/n} "I propose destroying all the thassertium already mined, as well as its deposits. Allowing an abomination like that to exist is against the Lex. As for assessing the degree of Thassera's corruption and deciding its fate, the law prescribes leaving this to the judgement of the world's owners — that is, the Administratum."
languages.original_text: "Куда важнее решить, что делать с тассерцием. Мы не можем проигнорировать подобный... ресурс". {n}Соломон смотрит вам прямо в глаза.{/n} "Мое предложение — уничтожить весь добытый тассерций и его залежи. Против Лекса позволять существовать подобной мерзости. Что касается оценки осквернения Тассеры и ее участи, закон предписывает оставить это на суд владельца мира — Администратума".

languages.text: “我们得决定如何处理这些塔瑟拉水晶，这个问题重要得多。这种资源……绝对不能坐视不管。”{n}索罗蒙直视着你的眼睛。{/n}“我建议销毁所有已经开采的塔瑟拉水晶，将矿床彻底摧毁。若是允许这种邪恶的水晶继续存在下去，等同于违背帝国律法。至于该如何评估塔瑟拉的腐化程度，如何决定它的命运，根据法律规定，相关权力属于这个世界的主人，也就是内政部。”
languages.original_text: "Deciding what to do with the thassertium is far more important. It is a... resource we cannot afford to ignore." {n}Solomorne looks you straight in the eye.{/n} "I propose destroying all the thassertium already mined, as well as its deposits. Allowing an abomination like that to exist is against the Lex. As for assessing the degree of Thassera's corruption and deciding its fate, the law prescribes leaving this to the judgement of the world's owners — that is, the Administratum."

traits.locale_text: “我们得决定如何处理这些塔瑟拉水晶，这个问题重要得多。这种资源……绝对不能坐视不管。”{n}索罗蒙直视着你的眼睛。{/n}“我建议销毁所有已经开采的塔瑟拉水晶，将矿床彻底摧毁。若是允许这种邪恶的水晶继续存在下去，等同于违背帝国律法。至于该如何评估塔瑟拉的腐化程度，如何决定它的命运，根据法律规定，相关权力属于这个世界的主人，也就是内政部。”

languages.text: 「タッセリウムをどう扱うかを決めることの方が、はるかに重要です。これは…無視できない資源ですから」{n}ソロモーンはあなたの目をじっと見つめた。{/n}「すでに採掘されたタッセリウムも、まだ埋蔵されているものもすべて破壊することを提案します。あのような異端の存在を放置することは、レックスに反します。タッセーラの汚染の程度を評価し、その運命を決める件については、その惑星の所有者、すなわち帝国行政局の判断に委ねると法に定められています」
languages.original_text: "Deciding what to do with the thassertium is far more important. It is a... resource we cannot afford to ignore." {n}Solomorne looks you straight in the eye.{/n} "I propose destroying all the thassertium already mined, as well as its deposits. Allowing an abomination like that to exist is against the Lex. As for assessing the degree of Thassera's corruption and deciding its fate, the law prescribes leaving this to the judgement of the world's owners — that is, the Administratum."

traits.locale_text: 「タッセリウムをどう扱うかを決めることの方が、はるかに重要です。これは…無視できない資源ですから」{n}ソロモーンはあなたの目をじっと見つめた。{/n}「すでに採掘されたタッセリウムも、まだ埋蔵されているものもすべて破壊することを提案します。あのような異端の存在を放置することは、レックスに反します。タッセーラの汚染の程度を評価し、その運命を決める件については、その惑星の所有者、すなわち帝国行政局の判断に委ねると法に定められています」

languages.text: «Es mucho más importante decidir qué hacer con el thassertio. Se trata de un... recurso que no podemos permitirnos el lujo de ignorar». {n}Solomorne te mira directamente a los ojos.{/n} «Propongo destruir todo el thassertio que se ha excavado, junto con sus depósitos. Permitir la existencia de semejante abominación vulnera la Lex. En lo relativo a evaluar el grado de corrupción de Thassera a fin de decidir su destino, la ley dicta que lo dejemos en manos de los dueños del planeta; en este caso, el Administratum».
languages.original_text: "Deciding what to do with the thassertium is far more important. It is a... resource we cannot afford to ignore." {n}Solomorne looks you straight in the eye.{/n} "I propose destroying all the thassertium already mined, as well as its deposits. Allowing an abomination like that to exist is against the Lex. As for assessing the degree of Thassera's corruption and deciding its fate, the law prescribes leaving this to the judgement of the world's owners — that is, the Administratum."

traits.locale_text: «Es mucho más importante decidir qué hacer con el thassertio. Se trata de un... recurso que no podemos permitirnos el lujo de ignorar». {n}Solomorne te mira directamente a los ojos.{/n} «Propongo destruir todo el thassertio que se ha excavado, junto con sus depósitos. Permitir la existencia de semejante abominación vulnera la Lex. En lo relativo a evaluar el grado de corrupción de Thassera a fin de decidir su destino, la ley dicta que lo dejemos en manos de los dueños del planeta; en este caso, el Administratum».

languages.text: "Tasertiyuma ne olacağına karar vermek çok daha önemli. Bu, görmezden gelemeyeceğimiz bir kaynak." {n}Solomorne, gözlerinin içine bakıyor.{/n} "Hâlihazırda çıkarılmış tüm tasertiyumun yanı sıra yataklarının da yok edilmesini öneriyorum. Böyle bir iğrençliğin var olmasına izin vermek, Lex'e aykırıdır. Thassera'nın yozlaşma derecesini değerlendirmeye ve kaderine karar vermeye gelince... Kanunlar bunu dünyanın sahibinin, yani Administratum'un takdirine bırakmayı öngörür."
languages.original_text: "Deciding what to do with the thassertium is far more important. It is a... resource we cannot afford to ignore." {n}Solomorne looks you straight in the eye.{/n} "I propose destroying all the thassertium already mined, as well as its deposits. Allowing an abomination like that to exist is against the Lex. As for assessing the degree of Thassera's corruption and deciding its fate, the law prescribes leaving this to the judgement of the world's owners — that is, the Administratum."

traits.locale_text: "Tasertiyuma ne olacağına karar vermek çok daha önemli. Bu, görmezden gelemeyeceğimiz bir kaynak." {n}Solomorne, gözlerinin içine bakıyor.{/n} "Hâlihazırda çıkarılmış tüm tasertiyumun yanı sıra yataklarının da yok edilmesini öneriyorum. Böyle bir iğrençliğin var olmasına izin vermek, Lex'e aykırıdır. Thassera'nın yozlaşma derecesini değerlendirmeye ve kaderine karar vermeye gelince... Kanunlar bunu dünyanın sahibinin, yani Administratum'un takdirine bırakmayı öngörür."

languages.text: « Le plus important reste de décider de ce que nous allons faire du thassertium. C'est une... ressource que nous ne pouvons pas nous permettre d'ignorer. » {n}Solomorne vous regarde droit dans les yeux.{/n} « Je propose de détruire tout le thassertium déjà miné, au même titre que ses dépôts. L'existence même de cette abomination va à l'encontre de la Lex. Quant à déterminer le degré de corruption de Thassera et décider de son sort, la loi impose de laisser ce jugement aux propriétaires du monde concerné... autrement dit, l'Administratum. »
languages.original_text: "Deciding what to do with the thassertium is far more important. It is a... resource we cannot afford to ignore." {n}Solomorne looks you straight in the eye.{/n} "I propose destroying all the thassertium already mined, as well as its deposits. Allowing an abomination like that to exist is against the Lex. As for assessing the degree of Thassera's corruption and deciding its fate, the law prescribes leaving this to the judgement of the world's owners — that is, the Administratum."

traits.locale_text: « Le plus important reste de décider de ce que nous allons faire du thassertium. C'est une... ressource que nous ne pouvons pas nous permettre d'ignorer. » {n}Solomorne vous regarde droit dans les yeux.{/n} « Je propose de détruire tout le thassertium déjà miné, au même titre que ses dépôts. L'existence même de cette abomination va à l'encontre de la Lex. Quant à déterminer le degré de corruption de Thassera et décider de son sort, la loi impose de laisser ce jugement aux propriétaires du monde concerné... autrement dit, l'Administratum. »

languages.text: "Die Entscheidung, was wir mit dem Thassertium machen, ist viel wichtiger. Es ist eine ... Ressource, die wir nicht ignorieren können." {n}Solomorne blickt dir direkt in die Augen.{/n} "Ich schlage vor, das bereits abgebaute Thassertium sowie die übrigen Vorkommen zu zerstören. Die Existenz einer solchen Abscheulichkeit zu dulden, verstößt gegen das Lex. Und was die Einschätzung der Verderbtheit von Thassera und die Entscheidung über seine Zukunft angeht, so schreibt das Gesetz vor, dass die Besitzer der Welt darüber befinden sollen – in diesem Fall also das Administratum."
languages.original_text: "Deciding what to do with the thassertium is far more important. It is a... resource we cannot afford to ignore." {n}Solomorne looks you straight in the eye.{/n} "I propose destroying all the thassertium already mined, as well as its deposits. Allowing an abomination like that to exist is against the Lex. As for assessing the degree of Thassera's corruption and deciding its fate, the law prescribes leaving this to the judgement of the world's owners — that is, the Administratum."

Die Existenz einer solchen Abscheulichkeit zu dulden, verstößt gegen das Lex. Und was die Einschätzung der Verderbtheit von Thassera und die Entscheidung über seine Zukunft angeht, so schreibt das Gesetz vor, dass die Besitzer der Welt darüber befinden sollen – in diesem Fall also das Administratum."
